feature_flags: default
real_type: f64
operation_sequence: Mesh::cube("Cube1").difference(Mesh::cube("Cube2").translate(0.5,0.5,0.5))
input_coordinates: unit cube faces transformed by cube constructor and translation
metadata: Cube1 on minuend polygons, Cube2 on subtrahend polygons
expected_behavior: Difference output metadata is present and belongs to one of the source objects.
observed_behavior: Difference may include clipped boundary polygons carrying either Cube1 or Cube2 metadata.
normalized_geometry_summary: finite mesh, non-empty polygon list, metadata restricted to known source labels.
